user.title: Set up Electra AC (IR)
user.description: Select at least one infrared emitter or receiver to use with your Electra air conditioner.

data_description.infrared_entity_id: The infrared emitter entity to use for sending commands to the air conditioner.
data_description.infrared_receiver_entity_id: The infrared receiver entity to use for keeping the state in sync with the physical remote.

error.missing_infrared_entity: Select an infrared emitter or receiver.

abort.already_configured: This device is already configured with this infrared entity.
abort.no_infrared_entities: No infrared emitters or receivers were found. Set up an IR emitter integration (such as Broadlink or ESPHome) first.
